_comment: RDMA Image Pipeline — Node 1 (processor / receiver).  Run on machine 1.
_comment2: Node 1 receives one decoded image per round from node 0 into stream slot 20,
_comment4: The RDMA recv frees slot 20 before each receive so records don't accumulate.

nodes._comment: ─── 3-round pipeline: recv image from node 0 → process → export to I/O slot 1
nodes._comment2: rdma_recv populates stream slot 20 before each round from node 0 (peer 0).
nodes._comment3: Stage cursors advance each round so each stage reads its input exactly once.

nodes._comment: ─── Save 3 processed images from I/O slot 1 to disk ────────────────────────
─── Free intermediate stream slots and output I/O slot ──────────────────────
